title: Smart Parking | Control Applications
content_html:
Smart parking

The IGP smart parking system makes use of advanced computer vision technology in order to identify vacant parking or occupied parking and then correspondingly turns on an appropriate green/red/blue signal of vacant or occupied parking.

The system includes the option of up to 2 cameras which enable the identification of up to 3 parking lots in one unit.

  • Marking free/occupied parking spaces using red/green/blue LED lights.

  • Extremely reliable technology for identifying the condition of the parking space using a camera (not ultrasonic)

  • Identification of car numbers.

  • Finding the location of a car in the parking lot.

  • Safety - very low voltage feed.

  • Communication Rs485, TCP/IP

  • Monitoring of 2 parking spaces per unit.

 

Options:

  • Signage and guidance system based on 32' screens

  • An alarm report for maintenance purposes that includes the possibility of communication alarms and unit faults.

  • Production of a monthly report with a daily breakdown regarding the amount of uses in the parking lots in the building.

  • Production of a daily graph that includes a parking lot usage profile by time of day

  • Displaying data in real time on AutoCAD images of the parking lot.
